scripts.minify:css: npx --yes clean-css-cli -o assets/css/main.min.css assets/css/main.css && npx --yes clean-css-cli -o assets/css/reservation.min.css assets/css/reservation.css && npx --yes clean-css-cli -o assets/css/admin.min.css assets/css/admin.css
scripts.minify:js: npx --yes terser assets/js/main.js -c -m -o assets/js/main.min.js && npx --yes terser assets/js/reservation.js -c -m -o assets/js/reservation.min.js && npx --yes terser assets/js/admin.js -c -m -o assets/js/admin.min.js
scripts.build:assets: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
